title: force/release for the instance connection and hierarchical reference signal

features.name: force_release on hierarchical instance port reference
features.description: Code should include force and release statements targeting a hierarchical reference to an instance input port

features.name: force_release on wire with continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include force and release statements on a wire that is driven by a continuous assignment

features.name: comparing force_release behavior between hierarchical and direct references
features.description: Code should include both force/release on a hierarchical instance port reference and force/release on the equivalent direct wire reference to compare behavior
